aka: Nam Jeong-im Goes to Women's Army Corps
trans_title: Nam Jeong-im Goes to Women's Army Corps
introduction: Nam-jung (Nam Jung-myeon), a representative of the Lilac Club, a group of young women who volunteer for community service, meets Goto Toshi, a photographer of a magazine photographer, while doing shoe-making to raise money for poor children's charity in the streets. On the other hand, Jo Kang-hee (gangmoon), a friend of Nam Jung-im and a member of the Lilac Club, is in a relationship with Seo Guddal (Seo Young-chun) The two couples get tired of each other, but eventually they have a joint wedding ceremony and pack up a family. He is a supermarket operator and has a daughter with Kang Hee. On the other hand, Gogetik and Nam Jung - im give birth to a son. After marriage, Nam Jung-il and Kang-hee actively participated in the Lilac Club and realized that the importance of national defense had been recognized at the time of the 1.21 incident, and decided that all members of the Lilac Club would join the local reserve forces in order to raise awareness in society. During the four weeks of hard training and during the last training of mock spy operations, he encountered a real spy and succeeded in catching a spy with Kang Hee. In the 100th anniversary of the birth of a mother and a goddess, the relatives of relatives, teachers, instructors, and members of the Lilac Club gather together to take a commemorative photo. (movie)
